description.description: Specifies a textual description of the image for identification and documentation purposes.

disk_size_gb.description: Specifies the size of the image disk in gigabytes, must be equal to or greater than the source disk's size.

family.description: Specifies the image family to group related images for rolling updates and version management.

guest_os_features.description: Specifies the enabled guest operating system features for the image, such as UEFI_COMPATIBLE or VIRTIO_SCSI_MULTIQUEUE.

image_encryption_key.description: Specifies the custom encryption key to secure the image. Must match the format required for Google Compute Engine encryption keys.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the image, typically used for management and filtering purposes.

licenses.description: List of URIs representing the licenses applied to the image; must be valid and compatible with the image configuration.

name.description: Specifies the name of the image, which must be unique within the project.

raw_disk.description: Specifies the raw disk configuration, including source file and disk format, used to create the image.

shielded_instance_initial_state.description: Specifies the initial state to configure shielded instance features for the image, such as Secure Boot, vTPM, and Integrity Monitoring.
shielded_instance_initial_state.type: list(object({dbs: list(object({content: string,file_type: optional(string)})),dbxs: list(object({content: string,file_type: optional(string)})),keks: list(object({content: string,file_type: optional(string)})),pk: list(object({content: string,file_type: optional(string)}))}))

source_disk.description: Specifies the source disk used to create the image. Must be an existing persistent disk in the same project and zone.

source_disk_encryption_key.description: Specifies the encryption key used to encrypt the source disk. Required if the source disk is encrypted with a customer-supplied encryption key.

source_image.description: Specifies the source image used to create the custom image, must be in the same project or accessible via shared images.

source_image_encryption_key.description: Specifies the customer-managed encryption key used to encrypt the source image. Must match the key used for the source image's encryption.

source_snapshot.description: Specifies the source snapshot used to create the image. Must be the full or partial URL of the snapshot.

source_snapshot_encryption_key.description: Specifies the customer-supplied encryption key for the source snapshot, required if the snapshot is encrypted.

storage_locations.description: Specifies the geographic locations where the image is stored; must be a valid Google Cloud region or multi-region.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeouts for create, update, and delete operations on the compute image.
